text: Re-vendored engine bundles from vfkb commit fea3895 (vilosource/vfkb PR #76): storage.defaultProject() replaces the hard-coded 'spike' project label — derived from the brain dir (<repo>/.vfkb → repo), else $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR, else cwd; VFKB_PROJECT still wins. Plugin version 0.1.0 → 0.1.1. Verified the VENDORED copy in a sandbox: VFKB_DATA_DIR=<sandbox>/fakerepo/.vfkb renders <vfkb-resume project="fakerepo">.
